channel.title: Posts on blogpage
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on blogpage

item.title: new at git
item.description:
being a completely new and completely blind in experience at using something i thought was so complicated, apparently it is easy to use if you have fundamental english skills and knowledge in obscure words, especially if you’re a non-english speaker.

also maybe in this post there maybe some grammatical(?) errors in the paragraph so please understood as i am not an native english speaker.

(the last few words are google translated)

item.title: did it work??
item.description:
this is test, pls ignore

it worked!!!!!
